certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode. When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11 of the Security Policy.
certificate.description: The Linux kernel crypto API implementation provides cryptographic services to Linux kernel space software components and user space via the AF_ALG interface.

services.description: Encrypt a plaintext

services.name: Authenticated decryption
services.description: Decrypt a ciphertext
services.approvedFunctions: AES CCM, GCM (external IV) AES CBC or CTR with HMAC-SHA2- 256, SHA2-384, or SHA2-512

services.name: Compression
services.description: Compress data (deflate, lzo, zlib-deflate)

services.name: Generic system call
services.description: Use the kernel to perform various non- cryptographic operations

services.name: Show version
services.description: Return the module name and version information

services.name: Show status
services.description: Return the module status
